name: Checkbox
description: A toggle control that allows selecting one or more options.

props.name: size
props.description: Checkbox size controlling box dimensions, label text, and icon size.

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the checkbox is checked. Reflects to the `checked` attribute.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and apply dimmed styling.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Show a horizontal dash icon instead of a checkmark (third state).

props.name: invalid
props.description: Apply error border styling when unchecked.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme for the checked/indeterminate state background and icon.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name, used in form submissions.

props.name: value
props.description: Value included in `kb-change` event detail and form submissions.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Helper text rendered below the label.

events.name: kb-change
events.description: Checked state changed. Detail: `{ checked: boolean, value?: string }`.
